name: Mini Peach Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, melted butter, and extract.
3. Gradually add the liquid ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Gently fold in the diced peach and chopped almonds until just combined.
5. Spoon the batter into prepared mini-muffin tins.
6. Bake at 400°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
